/usr/bin/ar qc libfix_engine_lib.a CMakeFiles/fix_engine_lib.dir/src/fix_engine/fix_message.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fix_engine_lib.dir/src/fix_engine/fix_session.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fix_engine_lib.dir/src/fix_engine/fix_session_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fix_engine_lib.dir/src/fix_engine/message_parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fix_engine_lib.dir/src/order_manager/order_book.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fix_engine_lib.dir/src/order_manager/position_tracker.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fix_engine_lib.dir/src/order_manager/order_validator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fix_engine_lib.dir/src/order_manager/execution_report_generator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fix_engine_lib.dir/src/order_manager/order_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fix_engine_lib.dir/src/market_data/order_book_level.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fix_engine_lib.dir/src/market_data/price_generator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fix_engine_lib.dir/src/market_data/matching_engine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fix_engine_lib.dir/src/market_data/market_data_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fix_engine_lib.dir/src/market_data/symbol_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fix_engine_lib.dir/src/market_data/simulated_exchange.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fix_engine_lib.dir/src/contestant_engine/tcp_ingress.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fix_engine_lib.dir/src/shadow_engine/telemetry_bridge.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fix_engine_lib.dir/src/risk/risk_types.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fix_engine_lib.dir/src/risk/risk_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fix_engine_lib.dir/src/metrics/metrics_collector.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fix_engine_lib.dir/src/admin/admin_server.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fix_engine_lib.dir/src/persistence/message_store.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fix_engine_lib.dir/src/utils/logger.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fix_engine_lib.dir/src/utils/config_loader.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libfix_engine_lib.a
